title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Unveils Supercomputing Research That Raises the Bar for Achieving Quantum Advantage
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced new research that demonstrates how supercomputers can be used to test and benchmark computational performance for the quantum computing community, redefining theoretical performance claims that future quantum computers will deliver. title: HPE GreenLake Selected to Expand Core Cloud Offering and Enhance Desktop-as-a-Service for CDW ServiceWorks
text: LONDON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced that CDW, a leading global managed service provider, has selected the HPE GreenLake edge-to-cloud platform to enhance its core UK cloud suite of products called ServiceWorks. HPE GreenLake will enable ServiceWorks to meet increasing demand, accelerate deployment of new services and improve overall customer experience for its Desktop-as-a-Service platform. title: Werder Bremen Partners with Hewlett Packard Enterprise to Advance Fan Experience and Data Intelligence
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced that it has been selected by German soccer club SV Werder Bremen to jointly drive a comprehensive digital transformation initiative aimed at advancing fan experience and data intelligence. As part of the project, HPE will deploy and manage an edge-to-cloud infrastructure and the analytics and data lakehouse platform HPE Ezmeral. text: SAN JOSE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Aruba Central cloud-native network operations and analytics platform has been “Authorized” by FedRAMP for use across the federal government.

title: Barclays Bumps Up Hewlett Packard Enterprise Price Target By 25%
